mechanism_narrative: Persistently low federal funds rates reduce the discount rate applied to future corporate earnings, directly supporting higher equity valuations and generating positive forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns are negative in >65% of months where FEDFUNDS remains below 0.5%, or rolling Rank IC falls below 0.02 over any 3-year window.

mechanism_narrative: A rapid three-month increase in the unemployment rate exceeding 0.3 percentage points signals an abrupt labor market deterioration that immediately triggers risk-off positioning and negative equity returns over the following week.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns remain positive in >70% of instances following a 0.3pp unemployment spike, or the signal shows no statistical significance in out-of-sample testing.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous expansion in retail sales and housing starts confirms broad-based consumer demand strength, driving corporate revenue growth expectations and generating positive equity returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Quarterly forward returns are negative in >60% of periods where both RSAFS and HOUST trend upward, or the joint signal predictive power vanishes when controlling for monetary policy.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production index values reflect expanding manufacturing capacity utilization that directly boosts corporate profit margins, yielding positive forward equity returns when the economy operates above potential output.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns turn negative in >65% of months when INDPRO rises, or the mechanism fails to predict returns during periods of supply chain bottlenecks where capacity constraints cap profitability.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly inflation print exceeding 0.4% triggers immediate expectations of central bank tightening, compressing equity multiples and forcing rapid portfolio deleveraging that drives negative returns over the following week.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns remain positive in >70% of months following a 0.4% inflation spike, or the signal loses predictive accuracy when inflation is driven by transitory supply shocks rather than demand pull.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent growth in total nonfarm payrolls and a declining unemployment rate confirms a tightening labor market that supports wage growth and consumer spending, generating positive equity returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Quarterly forward returns are negative in >60% of periods where PAYEMS rises and UNRATE falls simultaneously, or the interaction effect is statistically indistinguishable from independent single-series effects.

mechanism_narrative: Higher quarterly real GDP growth directly translates to stronger corporate earnings trajectories, providing a fundamental floor for equity valuations and producing positive forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns are negative in >65% of quarters following positive GDP revisions, or rolling Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 3-year window.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly industrial production decline exceeding 0.5% signals an abrupt manufacturing contraction that immediately triggers risk-off sentiment and negative equity returns over the following week.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns remain positive in >70% of months following a 0.5% industrial production drop, or the signal shows no statistical significance in out-of-sample walk-forward testing.
